creator: olivierw1+bugzilla-freebsd@hotmail.com
text:
Hello,

It's the first time I'm installing squid on FreeBSD, so I don't know for how long this problem exists.

So, I installed the squid package v3.5.22 on FreeBSD 11 and when starting it with the default configuration file I get the message: "Shared object libheimntlm.so.11 not found, required by "squid"".

This file seems to belong to security/heimdal, but it should not search for it because the package is setup with "GSSAPI_HEIMDAL=off".

Best Regards
